column1: There (be) a lot of people at the conference.
She says she (have to) change the clock. It gains.
I assure you he never (tell a lie).
They say they (publish) this book next year.
There (be) a letter for me tomorrow. You (get) it?
He said he never (forgive) me unless I apologized.
You (not tell) him about our plans! – Calm down! Bob said he (do) it.
We’re lost. I (stop) and ask the way.
